title: Source Quality and News Selection Gap Record

gaps.description: Need to verify whether source fetching, scoring, title generation, subtitle generation and selection quality match planned logic.
Generated daily context contains default rule, but AG60B must not treat it as full source-driven selection until source/fetch script proves it.
Sports fallback JSON exists, but live sports/news context quality and heading generation are not yet verified.
Cultural modules require source-method validation before being treated as generated factual modules.
